headlines.title: Democrats maintain an edge in the fight for Congress as Trump gets poor marks
headlines.description: President Donald Trump’s poor approval rating continues to weigh down his party ahead of the midterms — though the GOP has a slim measure of separation from the president, with Democrats holding a 5-point lead in the battle for control of Congress, according to a new national NBC News poll

headlines.title: Sen. Mitch McConnell admitted to the hospital, spokesperson says
headlines.description: Sen. Mitch McConnell, R-Ky., the former Senate majority leader, was hospitalized on Sunday, according to his spokesperson.“Senator McConnell was admitted to the hospital this morning,” spokesperson David Popp said in a statement.

headlines.title: Trump endorses Rep. Mike Collins in Georgia Senate race
headlines.description: President Donald Trump has endorsed GOP Rep.

headlines.title: Tracking the DOJ's effort to get U.S. voter registration data
headlines.description: The Justice Department is seeking voter registration list data from all 50 states and the District of Columbia over the past year.

headlines.title: Trump and Dana White walk out together to kick off UFC Freedom 250
headlines.description: President Donald Trump and Ultimate Fighting Championship President and CEO Dana White walk out of the White House to kick off UFC Freedom 250.

headlines.title: Deal between U.S., Iran has been reached says Pakistan's prime minister
headlines.description: Prime Minister of Pakistan Shehbaz Sharif announced that a deal between the U.S. and Iran has been reached with a signing expected on Friday in Switzerland. NBC News' Keir Simmons, Gabe Gutierrez and Matt Bradley report.

headlines.title: Steve Kornacki: America 250 poll shows nation marked by doubt and pessimism
headlines.description: NBC News chief data analyst Steve Kornacki joins Meet the Press to break down a new NBC News poll ahead of the nation’s 250 birthday next month, with most saying the U.S. has already seen its best days and over one-fifth of respondents saying they are only a little or not at all proud to be Americans.

headlines.title: U.S. deportation tracker: Counting arrests, detentions and border crossings
headlines.description: President Donald Trump came into office promising the largest mass deportation in U.S history, targeting the more than 10 million unauthorized migrants living in the United States.

headlines.title: State Assemblyman Alex Bores speaks on AI and politics
headlines.description: State Assemblyman Alex Bores, a candidate for New York's 12th Congressional District, speaks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about why some top artificial intelligence companies are opposing his candidacy and whether AI should play a role in politics.

headlines.title: United States and Iran reach agreement to end war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz
headlines.description: An agreement has been reached between the United States and Iran to end fighting and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, according to President Donald Trump and details of a draft memorandum of understanding released by Iranian state-affiliated media Sunday.

headlines.title: Sen. James Lankford says Congress should ratify any deal Trump makes with Iran
headlines.description: Sen. James Lankford, R-Okla., on Sunday said “it is best” if Congress votes to ratify any potential deal to end the war in Iran, saying that a deal approved by Congress would have a more “lasting effect.”“It is best if it is ratified by Congress; it has a more lasting effect on it,” Lankford told NBC News’ “Meet the Press.”He added that President Donald Trump is seeking to “end Iran’s constant attack of Americans and American assets and American allies in that region,” wh

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.
